root.rep_text: หนังสือยืนยันยอด

name_en.text: ทะเบียน ผู้รับรอง

sponcor.text: ชื่อสปอนเซอร์

baht_en.text: อัตราแลกเปลี่ยน

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as fname ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name_eng(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as fname_en ,pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) as id_card ,to_snumber(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)) as sharestock ,F_GET_NUMBER_TO_WORDS(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)) as number_eng ,'!data_date!' as tdate ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name_eng('!name_en!') as name_en ,'!sponcor!' as sponcor ,TO_CHAR( round( pka_com_function.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) / '!baht_en!' ), 'FM999,999,999,990.00' ) as baht_en_1 ,'!baht_en!' as baht_en_2 ,'!currency!'as currency ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where 1=1 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '051751'
